BUTTON_LABEL_SETUP: Setup (this is required to use other Button blocks)
BUTTON_CONSTRUCTOR_MESSAGE0: create $[CONSTRUCTED_VAR_NAME] button on pin $[PIN] with double-click limit $[DOUBLE_CLICK_LIMIT] ms debounce $[DEBOUNCE_TIME] ms
BUTTON_CONSTRUCTOR_TOOLTIP: Create a new Button instance on the specified GPIO pin with double-click, debounce
BUTTON_ON_TOOLTIP: Register a callback for the selected button event
BUTTON_ON_EDGE_TOOLTIP: Register a callback for the press or release event. Timestamp variables contain the event time.
BUTTON_ON_CLICK_TOOLTIP: Register a callback for the click event. The duration variable contains the press duration in milliseconds.
BUTTON_OFF_TOOLTIP: Remove the registered callback for the selected button event
BUTTON_IS_PRESSED_TOOLTIP: Return true when the button is currently pressed
BUTTON_CLOSE_TOOLTIP: Unregister GPIO event handlers for the button
